channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 19th March
item.description:
There is dumped rubbish on seaward rd close to the junction with Villiers rd.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Seward Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opened rubbish bag with blood and needles spilt our, 19th March
item.description:
On the pedestrian railway bridge there is a rubbish bag which is ripped open. There are hypodermic needles and blood stained wipes spilling out.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwich High Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 19th March
item.description:
This mini has not moved since before Christmas 2025. The number plates have been removed. It is parked in a pay and display. It is ignored by traffic wardens.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Spray Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree planting request, 19th March
item.description:
Tree was taken down and a hole is now left there with sawdust in there which is causing issues with trip hazard and also sawdust being thrown around the road JW
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Homemead Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned can SORB, 19th March
item.description:
This was reported in July 2025 and nothing has been done. It is parked in a bay which requires a permit. It has not moved since December 2024, it is shown as SORN with MOT expires 14th May 2025.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Richmond Place, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish Bags, 19th March
item.description:
Rubbish left outside house, this needs to be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Kent Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish left outside house, 19th March
item.description:
Resident has left rubbish outside and foxes have ripped the bag

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Kent Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stagnant water and drowning risk grit bin, 19th March
item.description:
Situated against the wall on grass adjoining number 43. The grit bin is full of stagnant water (it has been unused for several years): a health risk due to bacteria, mosquitoes, possible danger of disease and drowning risk to children. There is approximately 1 foot deep of, dark, foul smelling water that has built up over many months/years.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ridgebrook Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More flytipped items added – wick road further obstructed, 19th March
item.description:
Initial items reported two weeks ago. No action taken & since then, many more items have been dumped including a sofa, stool & other furniture. The area now resembles a tip & more items have been left in the road, obstructing vehicle access.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bradstock Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Human Forest E-hire Bikes Parked Overcrowded on parking bay dangerously, 19th March
item.description:
Abandoned Human Forest E-hire Bikes Parked Overcrowded on parking bay dangerously parked and blocking road crossing for the Pedestrians can hurt somebody. 164 Piccadilly.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 61, Piccadilly, Mayfair, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Human Forest E-hire Bikes Parked Overcrowded on parking bay dangerously, 19th March
item.description:
Abandoned Human Forest E-hire Bikes Parked Overcrowded on parking bay dangerously parked and blocking road crossing for the Pedestrians can hurt somebody. 164 Piccadilly.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 61, Piccadilly, Mayfair, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: St George’s Flags, 19th March
item.description:
St George’s Flags have been attached to lampposts on Stansted Crescent. When they catch the wind, they obstruct the view of the road when driving due to their location.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Stansted Crescent, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Someone has dumped a washing machine, chairs, 19th March
item.description:
Someone has dumped a washing machine, chairs and general rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25-31, Brunel Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: E-hire Bikes Parked Overcrowded on parking bay dangerously parked, 19th March
item.description:

item.description:

item.title: Pothole in Sutherland Avenue at junction with Yorkland Avenu, 19th March
item.description:
Significant pothole in Sutherland Avenue at Juncton with Yorkland Avenue
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Yorkland Avenue, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This is getting ridiculous, 19th March
item.description:
This is a trip/health hazard. We need a recycling bin

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mabley Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, 19th March
item.description:
This was reported over a month ago street light is continuously flickering on and off at night but
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodlands Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime E-hire Bikes Parked Overcrowded on parking bay dangerously parked, 19th March
item.description:
Abandoned Lime E-hire Bikes Parked Overcrowded on parking bay dangerously parked and blocking road crossing for the Pedestrians can hurt somebody. 164 Piccadilly.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 61, Piccadilly, Mayfair, City of Westminster

item.title: Two problems dumped black sacks, full of food and a settee, 19th March
item.description:
By the phone box on Brookedene Road there are a number of black sacks containing Food dumped and spilling onto the pavement. Across the junction on Hylton Street, there is a dumped settee. Both of these were dumped overnight. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brookdene Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
